channel.title: Flutter-Apps on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Flutter-Apps on Arrans github.io

item.title: rustdesk/rustdesk
item.description: An open-source remote desktop application designed for self-hosting, as an alternative to TeamViewer.

item.title: localsend/localsend
item.description: An open-source cross-platform alternative to AirDrop

item.title: Solido/awesome-flutter
item.description: An awesome list that curates the best Flutter libraries, tools, tutorials, articles and more.

item.title: leanflutter/awesome-flutter-desktop
item.description: A curated list of awesome things related to Flutter desktop.

item.title: ReVanced/revanced-manager
item.description: 💊 Application to use ReVanced on Android

item.title: authpass/authpass
item.description: AuthPass - Password Manager based on Flutter for all platforms. Keepass 2.x (kdbx 3.x) compatible.

item.title: Enough-Software/enough_mail_app
item.description: Mail app for iOS, Android and hopefully more platforms in the future. Based on Flutter.
